long_description:
[Acadia-SRE]-Network Interface is missing on the node in regional cluster [TOR] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/main/platform/alerts/troubleshooting_acadia_than_os_alerts.md#12-node-network-interface-is-missing
TIP Situation:                      Observed service-error-node_network_interface_missing_regional issue in Osprey-Acadia-OS
TIP Short Description:              Acadia node network interface missing for regional cluster
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:storage-platform-acadia:ca-tor::mzonecq1:microservice: 

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum (node_network_info{agent_tag_cluster_type="acadia", agent_tag_cluster=~"mzonec.*", agent_tag_cluster!~"mzonece1|mzonepk1|mzonepa1|mzonep91|mzonepy1|mzonepl1|mzonep81"}) by (host_hostname, agent_tag_cluster) < 25 = 17.00
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'mzonecq1' and host_hostname = 'tor2-qz1-sr2-rk015-s04'

Time:                11/20/2025 06:56 PM UTC
State:               Triggered

------
